a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Urban land area in square kilometers (km²), based on a combination of population counts (persons),
settlement points, and the presence of Nighttime Lights. Areas are defined as urban where contiguous lighted
cells from the Nighttime Lights or approximated urban extents based on buffered settlement points for which
the total population is greater than 5,000 persons.
Data source: Center for International Earth Science Information Network (via World Bank) (2025)
